writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một dự án hoặc kế hoạch mà bạn đã thực hiện từ đầu đến cuối. Sử dụng phrasal verbs từ PV3 để mô tả từng giai đoạn.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: phrasal verbs 3: set up, set out, set off, take on, take up, sort out, turn out, show up, run out of, take over
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I set out to organise a charity fundraising event for a local children's hospital. I set up a small committee of five volunteers who took on different responsibilities. We ran out of ideas for the main activity at first, but then one volunteer suggested a talent show, which turned out to be a brilliant idea. As the event date approached, I took up graphic design briefly to create our promotional posters. On the day, some performers showed up late, which caused some stress, but we sorted out the schedule quickly. In the end, the event turned out to be a huge success — we raised twice as much money as we had hoped. I turned down the idea of taking a break afterwards and immediately began planning the next event.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một ngày bạn đánh giá cao hoặc kỳ lạ, khi mọi thứ không xảy ra như kế hoạch. Sử dụng ít nhất 7 phrasal verbs từ PV3.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: phrasal verbs 3: wake up, set off, run out of, turn out, show up, sort out, switch off, take off, wear out
writing_prompts.example: It started as a perfectly ordinary Monday. I woke up on time, switched on the coffee machine, and set off for work feeling confident. Then things began to go wrong. The bus ran out of fuel and broke down in the middle of the road. I switched off my phone to save battery, which meant I couldn't call ahead to warn my boss. When I finally arrived, it turned out that my important morning meeting had been moved. A client who was supposed to show up sent a last-minute apology. We sorted out the rescheduling without too much difficulty, but by lunchtime I was completely worn out. I threw away the idea of working late and decided to take the afternoon off. It turned out to be a good decision — I rested, and the next day everything went smoothly.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một người trong gia đình bạn — tính cách, nghề nghiệp, và những gì họ đã đạt được. Sử dụng phrasal verbs từ PV3.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: phrasal verbs 3: take after, grow up, take up, take on, take over, set out, sort out, turn out, show off
writing_prompts.example: My father is someone I have always deeply admired. He grew up in a small coastal town with very few resources, but he set out to build a better life from a very young age. He took up engineering as a hobby as a teenager and later turned it into a career. He took on enormous challenges as a young professional. When his company manager retired, my father took over the department and led it to record profits. He set up a mentoring programme for young engineers, which turned out to be one of his proudest achievements. He sorted out countless technical problems with quiet efficiency. People always say that I take after him — same work ethic, same patience. He never showed off his success; he preferred to let his results speak for themselves.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sản phẩm hoặc công nghệ mà bạn thích hoặc không thích. Mô tả trải nghiệm sử dụng. Sử dụng phrasal verbs từ PV3.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: phrasal verbs 3: switch on, switch off, turn on, turn off, turn up, turn down, run out of, take up, wear out, turn out
writing_prompts.example: I recently bought a new smart speaker for my home, and I have very mixed feelings about it. When I first switched it on and set it up, I was amazed by how quickly it responded to my voice commands. I could turn off the lights, turn up the music, and even order groceries just by speaking. However, the speaker ran out of battery unexpectedly during an important online meeting, which was embarrassing. I turned down the volume every night so it wouldn't disturb my neighbours. Over time, the microphone wore out and started mishearing my commands. The company's customer service showed up eventually to replace the faulty part, but it took three weeks. Overall, it turned out to be a useful device despite its problems. Would I recommend it? Yes — but only if you're patient with technology.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một câu chuyện sáng tạo ngắn về một nhân vật gặp phải nhiều thử thách trong một ngày quan trọng. Sử dụng ít nhất 8 phrasal verbs từ PV3.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: phrasal verbs 3: wake up, set off, run out of, turn out, show up, sort out, switch off, take off, take on, wear out
writing_prompts.example: Emma woke up to her phone ringing loudly at five in the morning. Today was the day of her biggest job interview. She set off in her car with plenty of time to spare, feeling nervous but prepared. Halfway there, the car ran out of petrol. She switched off the engine and tried to stay calm. She sorted out an alternative by calling a taxi. When she finally showed up at the interview building, slightly breathless, the receptionist smiled and said the interview panel had been delayed too. The elevator had broken down. It turned out they were just as flustered as Emma. The interview itself went beautifully — Emma took on every difficult question with confidence. By the end of the day, she was completely worn out, but the company rang her back just two hours later to offer her the position.
